title: Aureline install-review fact grid record
description: Boundary schema for the install-review fact-grid projection used by install/update review sheets and operator-truth composites when they need one compact, reviewer-facing summary of: activation-budget posture, compatibility label, dependency source, rollback path, quarantine state, and whether the current workflow remains usable without the component. This record is a projection surface: it MUST reuse (and MUST NOT mint alternatives to) the vocabularies frozen in docs/runtime/target_discovery_and_install_review_taxonomy.md (install-review subject/disposition; host-boundary cues; notebook trust rung; structured round-trip risk class; activation-budget summary shape), docs/verification/install_review_packet.md (compatibility label state; activation-budget class; rollback/quarantine posture classes; catalog truth), docs/trust/capability_sheet_contract.md (reduced-mode / degraded capability classes), and docs/managed/managed_workspace_lifecycle_contract.md (local-only continuation admissible-surface meaning). Raw package bytes, raw URLs, raw repo paths, raw notebook contents, raw secrets, and raw provider payloads MUST NOT appear; the grid carries opaque refs, closed tokens, counts, and short reviewable sentences only. Adding a new enum member is additive-minor and bumps install_review_fact_grid_schema_version; repurposing an existing member is breaking and requires a governance decision.

install_review_fact_grid_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this fact-grid projection record family. Current value is 1.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape.

opaque_id.description: Opaque stable identifier safe to log and export. Raw secrets, raw absolute paths, raw URLs, and raw payload bytes never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 UTC timestamp captured from an authoritative or monotonic clock source.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short reviewer-facing sentence safe for UI, CLI, docs/help, support exports, and audit evidence. Raw secrets, raw URLs, and raw file bodies MUST NOT appear.

install_review_subject_class.description: Install-review subject class vocabulary re-exported from docs/runtime/target_discovery_and_install_review_taxonomy.md.

install_review_disposition_class.description: Install-review disposition class vocabulary re-exported from docs/runtime/target_discovery_and_install_review_taxonomy.md.

activation_budget_class.description: Activation-budget class vocabulary projected onto activation_budget_summary_record slice accounting; aligned with docs/verification/install_review_packet.md and artifacts/ecosystem/activation_budget_examples/.

compatibility_label_state.description: Compatibility label state vocabulary aligned with docs/verification/install_review_packet.md and artifacts/ecosystem/compatibility_label_audit.yaml.

registry_source_class.description: Registry/dependency source vocabulary aligned with docs/verification/install_review_packet.md and fixtures/ecosystem/install_review_manifest.yaml.

catalog_truth_state.description: Catalog truth state vocabulary projected alongside registry_source_class on install-review surfaces.

signature_reverify_state.description: Signature reverify state vocabulary for mirror/offline catalog verification projections.

rollback_posture_class.description: Rollback posture class projected on install-review surfaces; aligned with docs/verification/install_review_packet.md.

quarantine_posture_class.description: Quarantine posture class projected on install-review surfaces; aligned with docs/verification/install_review_packet.md and docs/extensions/extension_lifecycle_and_quarantine_sequence.md.

subject_ref.description: Opaque ref to the subject under review (extension id, bundle id, managed binding id, etc.).

catalog_snapshot_revision_ref.description: Opaque ref to the catalog snapshot/revision the review is quoting (mirror snapshot, offline bundle manifest revision, etc.). Null is admissible only when registry_source_class is public_registry or private_registry and the review is quoting a live registry view.

source_summary.description: Optional short sentence explaining the dependency source posture (for example: mirror is stale; offline bundle pinned; vendored local path pinned).

component_ref.description: Opaque ref to the component this row describes (extension id, bundle member id, managed binding id, etc.).

activation_budget_summary_ref.description: Opaque ref to the activation_budget_summary_record for managed-workspace contexts. Null is admissible only when activation_budget_class = not_applicable.

compatibility_label_packet_ref.description: Opaque ref to the compatibility_label_packet_record quoted by the review. Null is admissible only when compatibility_label_state is unclaimed_ecosystem_row or compatibility_unknown_pending_probe.

rollback_checkpoint_ref.description: Opaque ref to the rollback checkpoint retained for this component. Null admissible only when rollback_posture_class = no_rollback_required.

allOf.description: When activation_budget_class = not_applicable, activation_budget_summary_ref MUST be null.
A row that claims no rollback is required MUST set rollback_checkpoint_ref = null.
